name: skill-invoker
description: Generic wrapper prompt that executes a LeadGrow skill (braun-copywriting, campaign-copywriting, etc.) against campaign brief inputs and emits variant-shaped copy output. One prompt serves both Stage 7 agents — prior_agent_output discriminates the Braun vs secondary role.

input_schema.skill_text: string — full SKILL.md content as the operating instructions
input_schema.companion_texts: object — {filename: content} for skill companion files (variables.md, qa.md, etc.)
input_schema.segment_name: string — the target segment within the campaign
input_schema.segment_edps: array<string> — prospect-voice EDP bullets for this segment
input_schema.brief_market: string — market / ICP context from brief
input_schema.prior_agent_output: object|null — {variant_01, variant_02} from a prior agent when running as challenger; null for first agent (Braun)

provisional_reason: Hand-authored synthetic examples pending real Braun + campaign-copywriting dogfood runs in Phase 3.5.
